recipes.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
recipes.description: Classic Italian pasta dish with creamy egg sauce and crispy guanciale
instructions: Boil pasta in salted water until al dente
Cut guanciale into small strips and cook until crispy
Whisk eggs with grated pecorino and black pepper
Drain pasta and toss with guanciale
Remove from heat and mix in egg mixture quickly
Serve immediately with extra pecorino on top

recipes.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
recipes.description: Tender chicken pieces in a rich and creamy spiced tomato sauce
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices for 1 hour
Grill or pan-fry chicken until charred
Saute onion and garlic until soft
Add tikka paste and cook for 2 minutes
Add canned tomatoes and simmer for 15 minutes
Stir in cream and add chicken pieces
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve with rice

recipes.name: Caesar Salad
recipes.description: Crisp romaine lettuce with homemade Caesar dressing and crunchy croutons
instructions: Wash and chop romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces
Blend anchovy, egg yolk, lemon juice, and mustard
Slowly drizzle in olive oil while blending to emulsify
Toss lettuce with dressing until well coated
Top with croutons and shaved parmesan
Season with black pepper and serve immediately

recipes.name: Beef Tacos
recipes.description: Seasoned ground beef in crispy tortillas with fresh toppings
instructions: Brown ground beef in a skillet over medium heat
Add diced onion and cook until soft
Stir in taco seasoning and a splash of water
Simmer for 5 minutes until sauce thickens
Warm taco shells in the oven for 2 minutes
Fill shells with beef and top with lettuce, tomato, cheese
Serve with sour cream and salsa on the side

recipes.name: Margherita Pizza
recipes.description: Traditional Italian pizza with fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil
instructions: Preheat oven to 250C with a pizza stone
Stretch dough into a 12-inch round
Crush tomatoes and spread over dough
Tear mozzarella and distribute evenly
Bake for 8-10 minutes until crust is golden
Top with fresh basil and drizzle with olive oil

recipes.name: Pad Thai
recipes.description: Stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, peanuts, and tangy tamarind sauce
instructions: Soak rice noodles in warm water for 30 minutes
Mix tamarind paste, fish sauce, and sugar for the sauce
Stir-fry shrimp until pink, then set aside
Scramble eggs in the same wok
Add drained noodles and sauce, toss to coat
Add shrimp back and toss with bean sprouts
Serve topped with peanuts, green onions, and lime wedge

recipes.name: French Onion Soup
recipes.description: Rich beef broth with caramelized onions topped with melted Gruyere cheese
instructions: Slice onions thinly and cook in butter over low heat for 40 minutes
Sprinkle flour over caramelized onions and stir
Add white wine and cook until reduced by half
Pour in beef broth and add thyme, simmer for 20 minutes
Ladle soup into oven-safe bowls
Top with baguette slice and grated Gruyere
Broil until cheese is bubbly and golden

recipes.name: Sushi Rolls
recipes.description: Homemade maki rolls with fresh salmon, avocado, and cucumber
instructions: Cook sushi rice and season with rice vinegar
Slice salmon, avocado, and cucumber into thin strips
Place nori on bamboo mat, spread rice evenly
Arrange fillings along the center
Roll tightly using the bamboo mat
Slice each roll into 6-8 pieces with a wet knife
Serve with soy sauce, wasabi, and pickled ginger

recipes.name: Greek Moussaka
recipes.description: Layered eggplant and ground lamb casserole with creamy bechamel topping
instructions: Slice eggplants and salt them, let drain for 30 minutes
Grill or fry eggplant slices until golden
Brown lamb with diced onion and add tomatoes and cinnamon
Make bechamel: melt butter, add flour, whisk in milk
Layer eggplant, meat sauce, eggplant, meat sauce in a baking dish
Pour bechamel over top and sprinkle with parmesan
Bake at 180C for 45 minutes until golden brown

recipes.name: Banana Pancakes
recipes.description: Fluffy pancakes made with ripe bananas and a hint of cinnamon
instructions: Mash bananas in a large bowl until smooth
Whisk in eggs, milk, and sugar
Add flour, baking powder, and cinnamon, mix until just combined
Heat butter in a non-stick pan over medium heat
Pour batter to form pancakes, cook until bubbles appear
Flip and cook until golden brown on both sides
Serve stacked with maple syrup and sliced banana

recipes.name: Korean Bibimbap
recipes.description: Mixed rice bowl with assorted vegetables, beef, and spicy gochujang sauce
instructions: Cook rice and keep warm
Slice beef thinly and marinate in soy sauce and sesame oil
Julienne carrot and zucchini, blanch spinach and bean sprouts separately
Stir-fry each vegetable separately with a pinch of salt
Sear beef in a hot pan until just cooked
Arrange rice in a bowl, top with vegetables and beef in sections
Place a fried egg on top, serve with gochujang sauce

recipes.name: Chocolate Lava Cake
recipes.description: Warm chocolate cake with a gooey molten center, served with vanilla ice cream
instructions: Preheat oven to 200C and grease 4 ramekins
Melt chocolate and butter together over a double boiler
Whisk eggs and sugar until thick and pale
Fold chocolate mixture into egg mixture
Gently fold in flour until just combined
Pour into ramekins and bake for 12 minutes
Invert onto plates and serve immediately with ice cream
